prompt: Add a 2-bar melodic fill at the end of the verse before the chorus hits.

args.content:
ch 1 Melody
  plugin mini
  strip console1

ch 2 Bass
  plugin bass
  strip console1

ch 3 Chords
  plugin jup8
  strip console1

ch 4 Kick
  plugin kick

ch 5 Snare
  plugin drums

ch 6 HiHat
  plugin drums

arr verse 2 verse_fill 2 chorus 4

sec verse
  ch 1 Melody
    p q q q q
    n 60 62 64 65

  ch 2 Bass
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 3 Chords
    p w w
    n 48 52 55

  ch 4 Kick
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 5 Snare
    p _q q _q q
    n 38

  ch 6 HiHat
    p x x x x x x x x
    n 42

sec verse_fill
  ch 1 Melody
    p q q q q e e e e e e e e
    n 60 62 64 65 67 69 71 72 74 76 77 79

  ch 2 Bass
    cont

  ch 3 Chords
    cont

  ch 4 Kick
    cont

  ch 5 Snare
    cont

  ch 6 HiHat
    cont

sec chorus
  ch 1 Melody
    p q q q q
    n 65 67 69 72

  ch 2 Bass
    p q q _q q
    n 36

  ch 3 Chords
    p w w
    n 53 57 60

  ch 4 Kick
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 5 Snare
    p _q q _q q
    n 38

  ch 6 HiHat
    p x x x x x x x x
    n 42

judgment.relevance_reason: The AI correctly created a new 2-bar section 'verse_fill' between the verse and chorus and added a melodic fill.
